mppt_types.notes: Integrated MPPT / solar charger: 450 V max PV voltage, 65-450 V MPPT range, 12 A max operational PV input current, 16 A max PV short-circuit current, 6000 W total solar charging power, 3000 W per tracker, 100 A combined charger current.

battery_types.notes: Victron CAN compatibel, beperkt leverbaar NL via internationale EU-distributeurs ~€900–1100
Modular stack, ~€1000+/module; stack multiples for larger banks
Victron CAN compatibel, breed leverbaar NL ~€438–530/module (dutchsolarstore.nl, nordzon.nl)
Reference model. Market standard, ~€830–1150 Continuous charge/discharge working value set to 80A based on published US5000-1C product listings; short-duration higher rates not modeled yet.
Victron CAN compatibel, leverbaar NL ~€800/module (etbsmits.nl, eigenstroomopslaan.nl)

battery_banks.name: Pytes E-BOX-48100R (per module) bank
battery_banks.notes: Derived provisional battery-bank choice uses one module of the preferred or best-priced compatible battery type.

inverter_types.notes: Victron Multi RS Solar. Official specs: DC input 38-62 V, AC output 230 VAC, max continuous inverter current 25 A AC, peak 9 kW for 3 s / 7 kW for 4 min, solar: 450 V max, MPPT range 65-450 V, 2 x 3000 W trackers, 12 A max PV input current, 100 A combined charge current, 50 A transfer switch.

inverter_configurations.name: Multiplus-II 48/5000/70-50
inverter_configurations.notes: Derived provisional inverter choice currently uses the smallest catalog inverter until load-side configuration is modeled.
